headline: J&J secures extended NICE approval for Darzalex following earlier refusal
summary: NICE has preliminarily recommended D-VRd for NHS use as a first-line treatment for transplant-ineligible multiple myeloma.

content.title: J&J secures extended NICE approval for Darzalex following earlier refusal

headline: Get Paid Like an Indiana Police Officer With $5,000 a Month in Dividend Income After Taxes
summary: Five thousand dollars a month in spendable dividend income works out to $60,000 per year after federal tax, roughly equivalent to the salary of a typical police officer in Indiana. The headline yield shown on a brokerage statement does not tell the full story. Taxes, the type of distributions received, and future dividend growth all ... headline: A Portfolio That Doubles Your Social Security Check—and Your Spouse’s
summary: A $1.2 million portfolio generating $7,200 per month produces $86,400 in annual income, equivalent to a blended yield of 7.2%. According to the Social Security Administration’s 2026 COLA fact sheet, the average aged couple receiving Social Security benefits collects about $3,208 per month, or $38,496 per year. That means a portfolio generating $7,200 per month ... A Portfolio That Doubles Your Social Security Check—and Your Spouse’s

headline: The Dividend Strategy That Beats the 4% Rule by $400,000 Over 20 Years on a $1 Million Portfolio
summary: A 65-year-old retiree with $1 million who follows the standard 4% rule withdraws $40,000 in the first year, then increases that amount over time to keep pace with inflation. A dividend-focused alternative starts slightly lower, at about $38,000 in annual income from a 3.8% blended yield, but does not require selling shares. Over 20 years, ... The Dividend Strategy That Beats the 4% Rule by $400,000 Over 20 Years on a $1 Million Portfolio

headline: Vascarta Announces Addition of Richard Serbin to Leadership Team
summary: Vascarta Inc. is proud to announce the addition of Richard Serbin to its leadership team to serve in the role of Chief Strategy Officer. Richard Serbin will work closely with Vascarta's leadership to identify and evaluate new strategic partnership or acquisition opportunities that leverages his extensive experience as Johnson & Johnson's former Executive Vice President of Corporate Development.

content.title: Vascarta Announces Addition of Richard Serbin to Leadership Team
content.summary: Vascarta Inc. is proud to announce the addition of Richard Serbin to its leadership team to serve in the role of Chief Strategy Officer. Richard Serbin will work closely with Vascarta's leadership to identify and evaluate new strategic partnership or acquisition opportunities that leverages his extensive experience as Johnson & Johnson's former Executive Vice President of Corporate Development.

thumbnail.caption: Vascarta is a clinical stage specialty pharmaceutical company developing Vasceptor® (transdermal curcumin gel), a non-opioid drug candidate with potent analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties.

headline: The Bull Case For Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Could Change Following Key Oncology And Immunology Pipeline Wins - Learn Why
summary: In recent weeks, Johnson & Johnson reported positive late‑stage data and regulatory milestones across multiple therapies, including TECVAYLI in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, amivantamab-based regimens in lung and head and neck cancers, and a TREMFYA label update in psoriatic arthritis. These advances, alongside progress for nipocalimab in systemic lupus erythematosus and Sjögren's disease and expanded frontline use of Darzalex in the UK, highlight how Johnson & Johnson is broadening...

content.title: The Bull Case For Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Could Change Following Key Oncology And Immunology Pipeline Wins - Learn Why
content.summary: In recent weeks, Johnson & Johnson reported positive late‑stage data and regulatory milestones across multiple therapies, including TECVAYLI in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, amivantamab-based regimens in lung and head and neck cancers, and a TREMFYA label update in psoriatic arthritis. These advances, alongside progress for nipocalimab in systemic lupus erythematosus and Sjögren's disease and expanded frontline use of Darzalex in the UK, highlight how Johnson & Johnson is broadening...

headline: Johnson And Johnson Buys Firefly Bio To Deepen Oncology Growth Story
summary: Johnson & Johnson agreed to acquire Firefly Bio for $1 billion in a move to expand its oncology pipeline. The deal adds degrader-antibody conjugate technology focused on KRAS-driven cancers to Johnson & Johnson's research efforts. The acquisition is aimed at strengthening Johnson & Johnson's position in cancer therapeutics beyond its existing portfolio. For investors tracking NYSE:JNJ, this acquisition comes with the stock at a share price of $232.16 and multi-year returns that have been...
